headline: What SpaceX's expanded Starlink coverage means for the IPO
summary: SpaceX (SPAX.PVT) has expanded Starlink's coverage with a new partnership with US Mobile. Yahoo Finance Senior Autos Reporter Pras Subramanian goes over the details.

headline: Geopolitical Risks are Seriously High. Why I’d Shift to Dividends for Safety and Stability
summary: The markets might be breathing a sigh of relief after the two-week U.S.-Iran ceasefire agreement, but that doesn’t mean it’s time to let our guards down, especially since things are off to a turbulent start following Israel’s attack on Lebanon. headline: Quantum Computing ETFs Are Dying. Pivot to These 3 AI ETFs
summary: Quantum computing ETFs were the hottest names in town for months, but this is no longer the case. The capital flowing into them is instead flowing into, or about to flow into, names like the First Trust Indxx NextG ETF (NASDAQ:NXTG), Invesco AI and Next Gen Software ETF (NYSEARCA:IGPT), and State Street SPDR S&P Software & Services ETF ... Quantum Computing ETFs Are Dying. Pivot to These 3 AI ETFs

headline: Verizon Shares Rise 20.6% in Three Months: How to Play the Stock
summary: VZ rides fiber growth, Frontier deal and bundling push to drive gains, but rising costs, fierce telecom competition and heavy spending weigh on margins.

headline: DBS Bank Downgrades Verizon (VZ) to Hold Despite Strong Stock Performance
